response.step_by_step_log: The video was watched in its entirety. It consists of a static image representing a 'Hero Show' event. No vocal music or singing occurs during the clip. Therefore, no song metadata or lyrics were identified or searched for.
response.global_summary: The video is an introductory screen for 'Yukihana Lamy's Birthday 3D Hero Show', titled 'HoloRanger', featuring various Hololive members in a superhero-themed aesthetic. There is no actual vocal performance or song playing throughout the duration of this clip.

scenes.description: An introductory static screen for Yukihana Lamy's birthday 3D live event, featuring multiple anime-style characters with the title 'HoloRanger' in Japanese text at the bottom.
